name: Atlas Arteria
analysis: ALX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$5.0027. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.0483 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$5.0027, stop A$4.7520, target A$5.5040. Risk/reward is 2.00:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
